Title: News Feed Component
URL: https://swatkb.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DRUP/pages/175439879
Version: 5
---

The
News Feed
component displays recent news stories from a feed on the site. This component can only be created and maintained by ITS administrators. To request the creation of
News Feed
component on your site, email
support@swarthmore.edu
.
